name: Bittersweet Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until butter melts.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring constantly until sugar melts and sauce is smooth.
4. Serve warm. Store in a tightly covered container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month. Reheat over hot water.
